title: National Travel Survey 2024: Technical report
body: "Technical report for the 2024 National Travel Survey (NTS). The document contains:   information about the survey design information on the sample selection and fieldwork, including how we responded to the coronavirus (COVID-19) pandemic details of the data processing conducted by the survey contractor National Centre for Social Research (NatCen) explanations of the weighting methodology used within the survey an extensive glossary of terms related to the survey appendices containing the original letters, questionnaire, show-cards used in the interview, and tables of weighting model parameters   An accessible version of the technical report is in development and is due to be released in autumn 2025.  Previous technical reports  The below technical reports reflect the status of the NTS in previous years:   2023 2022 2021   Contact us   National Travel Survey statistics     Email national.travelsurvey@dft.gov.uk        "
